Implement the following plan:

# Omni Vault — Obsidian-Style Knowledge Base for the Orchestrator

## Context

The Omni orchestrator loses all context between sessions and within long conversations (context compaction). When a worker finishes, Omni gets a raw text notification but has no persistent record of what happened, what's pending, or what each session is good at. The user wants an Obsidian-style markdown vault so Omni can track state across sessions and conversations.
